caption: A man with a large, silver, cone-shaped wig and glasses is seated in a studio, wearing a white dress shirt and a bow tie. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments. On-screen text in the lower-left corner reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" alongside a microphone icon, and similar text "BOSS TALK 101" appears in the lower-center area. Across the sequence, the man remains relatively still, maintaining a steady gaze and a neutral facial expression. There is very little movement between the frames, with only slight shifts in his posture and head position as he listens or prepares to speak, while the camera angle and the studio environment remain completely static.
